title: Golden Glazed Norwegian Salmon Skewers
description: A spicy and creamy Norwegian dish featuring lemon zest and mushimono-steam, perfect for adventurous eaters, served on a lazy-susan-spinner for a fun and interactive meal. This high-protein-friendly dish is sure to please.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the salmon pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the lemon zest, yogurt, honey, sriracha sauce, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the salmon pieces, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and drizzle with olive oil.
Mushimono-steam the skewers in the oven for 8 minutes, or until the salmon is cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers on a lazy-susan-spinner and enjoy.
Garnish with additional lemon zest and parsley, if desired.
Serve immediately and be prepared for a fun and interactive meal.
